Rolling_Lyrics:
I walk the same circle every night
The door opens and closes without warning
A shadow answers each step I take
I keep the signal alive in my chest
Even silence has a memory of me

A door opens then forgets me
I push and it pushes back
A wire hums under my skin
I follow the signal anyway
The static is my only friend

My parents glow inside their streaming screens
I dance small tricks to make hearts appear
Each jump leaves another pixel on me
Likes fall slowly like quiet digital snow
The red heart beats louder than mine

I call for them but only screens answer
Their voices fade behind a wall of light
Signals bloom softly under my skin
Birds circle slowly like quiet satellites
The pixels know my name better than they do

My father called the sea a lesson
Cold water closed before I understood
A wet towel dimmed the light
He said be still, this is love
The wheel turns, the water rises
At the center I learn not to cry
